articles.title: Pankaj Advani Wins Record 27th World Title
articles.description: Indian snooker legend Pankaj Advani clinches his 27th world championship title, defeating England's Robert Hall in a thrilling final at the IBSF World Snooker Championship.

articles.title: New Youth Development Program Launched in Punjab
articles.description: Punjab Billiards and Snooker Association announces comprehensive youth development program aimed at identifying and nurturing young talent across the state, with special focus on grassroots training.

articles.title: National Snooker Championship 2024 Dates Announced
articles.description: The Billiards and Snooker Federation of India (BSFI) has announced the dates for the upcoming National Snooker Championship, scheduled to take place in Mumbai from March 15-25, 2024.

articles.title: Women's Snooker Gaining Momentum in India
articles.description: With increasing participation and support, women's snooker is experiencing unprecedented growth in India. New initiatives and tournaments are providing platforms for female players to showcase their talent.

articles.title: International Coaching Clinic Coming to Jalandhar
articles.description: Renowned international coach Michael Stevens will conduct a special coaching clinic in Jalandhar next month, offering advanced training techniques and personalized guidance to aspiring players.

articles.title: Punjab State Snooker Championship Results
articles.description: Complete results from the recently concluded Punjab State Snooker Championship, featuring outstanding performances from local players and emerging talents from across the state.
